clustering_analysis.description: Analysis of questionnaire responses with clustering of similar answers and outliers

variants: Micro managing, takes all credit, pushes blame down, rules stickler, bad vibes
Yelling. Micromanaging. Taking credit for your own work. Not protecting or investing in your employees.
Idk if this is bad like bad or bad like good gen z slang.  But the answer is micromanagement
Poor Communication, Small PP Syndrome, Leading from the rear
